# 🚀 Learning Roadmap — Networking, AWS & Beyond

---

## 🌐 Current Focus

**Networking & AWS** — Understanding how requests travel from client to server, and hands-on exploration with code generated alongside AI.

---

## 📅 Phase 1 — Building the Foundation

### Week 1 — Free Exploration & Fundamentals
> *Give yourself room to breathe, explore, and absorb.*

- Explore technologies freely without pressure
- Grasp core networking and cloud fundamentals
- Build intuition before structure

---

### Weeks 2–3 — Build Something Real
> *Outcome: Learn to plan and build scalable systems.*

- Finish building a complete product (simple to medium scope)
- Learn **Principles of Software Development — Part I**
- Focus on system thinking, clean architecture, and planning

---

### Week 4 — Cloud, Docker & DevOps Basics
> *Outcome: Deploy a production-ready application.*

- Cloud integration with **AWS**
- Learn **Docker** fundamentals
- Introduction to **DevOps** practices and pipelines

---

### Weeks 5+ — The Big Picture: AI & Emerging Tech
> *Outcome: Understand AI, build with it, and stay ahead of the curve.*

- **ML & AI Basics** — understand the landscape
- **Science & Mathematics** *(intentional break — theory as a breath of fresh air 🌿)*
- **Build AI Applications using AI** — use AI as a collaborator, actively read and learn from generated code
- **Stay Current** — build a personal system to track latest technologies and tech news, so you always move with the industry

---

## 🔄 Phase 2 — Reflect, Refine & Own Your Learning

### Consolidation & Self-Awareness
> *Turn unstructured experience into a clear personal learning model.*

- Gather and review all learning from Phase 1
- Identify weak areas and what to improve
- Discover your passion and natural strengths
- Build a **personal learning model** that tracks:
  - 📈 Current skill status
  - 🔧 What to improve
  - ❌ What to avoid or deprioritize

---

## 🧭 Guiding Principles

| Principle | Meaning |
|-----------|---------|
| **Learn by doing** | Build real things, not just tutorials |
| **AI as collaborator** | Use AI to build and actively read the code |
| **Breathe intentionally** | Theory and math are planned breaks, not distractions |
| **Stay connected** | Follow industry trends with a consistent system |
| **Reflect to grow** | Self-awareness is a skill too |

---

*Started with curiosity. Built with intention.*
